description.text: Confined arena with routes on different levels. One Base.

ru.original: Confined arena with routes on different levels. One Base.
ru.translation: Крытое поле боя с коридорами на всех уровнях. Одна база.

es.original: Confined arena with routes on different levels. One Base.
es.translation: Un escenario de espacio limitado y varios niveles. Un núcleo.

de.original: Confined arena with routes on different levels. One Base.
de.translation: Eine begrenzte Arena mit Routen auf verschiedenen Ebenen. Eine Basis.

pt.original: Confined arena with routes on different levels. One Base.
pt.translation: Área confinada com rotas em diversos planos. Uma Base.

fr.original: Confined arena with routes on different levels. One Base.
fr.translation: Une arène confinée avec des passages à tous les niveaux. Une base.
